item.title: My Neighbor Called Security on Me
item.description: My neighbor called the security on me because he claimed that my truck was toouching his yard...it wasn't

media:content.media:title: My Neighbor Called Security on Me
media:content.media:description: My neighbor called the security on me because he claimed that my truck was toouching his yard...it wasn't

item.title: Miserable Neighbors Got Confronted After Trying To Report My Yard
item.description: A couple people from the neighborhood committee were caught driving by my house taking pictures, and my dad actually confronted them about it. Meanwhile the golf course in the neighborhood is completely overgrown and being ignored, even though everyone here pays for it. Showing what’s really going on around here.

media:content.media:title: Miserable Neighbors Got Confronted After Trying To Report My Yard
media:content.media:description: A couple people from the neighborhood committee were caught driving by my house taking pictures, and my dad actually confronted them about it. Meanwhile the golf course in the neighborhood is completely overgrown and being ignored, even though everyone here pays for it. Showing what’s really going on around here.

item.title: I think they can
item.description: Money can buy cars, therefore they can buy happiness

media:content.media:title: I think they can
media:content.media:description: Money can buy cars, therefore they can buy happiness
